Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Furhter Responses To Interrogatories And Document Request;
Off Calendar Oct-15-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Geoffrey Spellberg, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: INFAC Management Corp.
Adrian J. Sawyer, Esq., appeared for Defendant & opposing party: Vernon R. Loucks, Jr.

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Interrogatories And Document Request is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to Interrogatory Nos. 14-19. The objections are overruled.
The motion is granted as to Request For Production Of Documents Nos. 19, 21, 22, 24, 25, and 27. The objections are overruled. The motion is denied as to No. 20 as it is overly broad. The motion is granted as to Nos. 23 and 26, as they seek the accounts of each individual defendant to whom the Request is directed.
Further responses shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Subpoena By Iig
Off Calendar Oct-15-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Geoffrey Spellberg, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: INFAC Management Corp.
Adrian J. Sawyer, Esq., appeared for Defendant & opposing party: Vernon R. Loucks, Jr.

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted & modified: Plaintiffs' Motion To Compel Responses To Subpoena By IIG is granted. IIG's objections are overruled. IIG is ordered to respond to the subpoena within 15 days of notice of this order.

Modification:
Motion denied as to No. 2.

Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
